para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 KU 02/05/19 Initial release. 1.01 KU 09/09/19 Added support for unplug, enhanced audio check 1.02 ND 02/14/19 mcdp related function call now need dprxss instance address instead of base address as first parameter 1.03 ND 09/11/20 Added support for New AV pattern generator 1.04 ND 02/12/21 Added case 'z' to display menu in PT mode. Added support to set the MSA values for the tx according to the selected stream to be displayed front the menu. Added the enabling of vblank interrupts for all streams in Dprx_InterruptHandlerActRx() handler. 1.05 ND 04/03/21 Moved all global variables declaration from .h to .c files due to gcc compiler compilation error. 1.06 ND 04/15/21 Added support for stream 2,3 and 4 handler interrupts 1.07 ND 02/25/22 Modified the code for de-asserting longer hpd for some gpu's to retrain our rx. 1.08 ND 07/18/22 Added support to the app for branch topology. Disabling the av pat gen before start of new training sequence. Updation of the LMK03318 address. 1.09 ND 08/26/22 Added DELAY macro to increase delay in IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock() if encountering iic race condition.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Nishant 19/12/20 Added support for vck190.Added ReadModifyWrite() for writing to vck190 register space.set_vphy() renamed to config_phy() and has two parameters for linerate and lanecount.

Ver Who Date Changes - ----- -----------------------------------------------. 1.00 Nishant 19/12/19 Added support for vck190, VCU118 DpTxSs_VideoPhyInit() renamed to DpTxSs_PhyInit() set_vphy() renamed to config_phy() and has two parameters for linerate and lanecount. The application files are common for ZCU102, VCU118 and VCK190 TX Only design 1.01 KU 22/10/20 Added support for fabric 8b10b implementation of of DP1.4 1.02 ND 01/12/21 Added support for VSC in application menu. Changed options for Format menu. 1.03 ND 04/01/21 Moved all global variables declaration from .h to .c files due to gcc compiler compilation error. Setting tx_is_reconnected=0 and setting max_cap_new=XDP_TX_LINK_BW_SET_810GBPS in hpd_con for TX CTS test case. 1.04 KU 04/12/21 Updated Versal GT programming to get /20 clk 1.05 ND 05/07/21 Setting bit[12] of Reg 0x1A4 to 1 for VSC Colorimetry support 1.06 ND 07/21/22 Updated the LMK03318 address. 1.07 ND 08/11/22 Added support for gpio to monitor gtpowergood for versal GT 1.08 ND 08/26/22 Added DELAY macro to increase delay in IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock() if encountering iic race condition.

briefdescription.para: This function initialize required platform-specifc peripherals.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if required peripherals are initialized and configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a training lost interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function takes care HPD event.
This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

memberdef.name: ColorFormats
memberdef.initializer:
= {
{XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGBX8, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUVX8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUYV8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGBX10, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUVX10, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV8_420, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_RGB8, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_YUV8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV10, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y_UV10_420, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_420, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_Y10, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_444, 10}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_BGRX8, XVIDC_CSF_RGB, 8}, {XVIDC_CSF_MEM_UYVY8, XVIDC_CSF_YCRCB_422, 8} }

briefdescription.para: This function is the main entry point for the interrupt example using the XDpTxSs driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function will set up the system with interrupts and set up Hot-Plug-Event (HPD) handlers.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the system setup failed.
XST_SUCCESS should never return since this function, if setup was successful, is blocking.

simplesect.para: If system setup was successful, this function is blocking in order to illustrate interrupt handling taking place for HPD events.

briefdescription.para: This function is a non-blocking UART return byte.
This function is the callback function for when the Video mode change event interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the Video mode change event interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the Video mode change event interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the Video mode change event interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a valid video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a valid video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a valid video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a no video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a no video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a no video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This is the main function for XDpTxSs interrupt example.

detaileddescription.para: If the DpTxSs_IntrExample function which sets up the system succeeds, this function will wait for the interrupts. Once a connection event or pulse is detected, DpTxSs will RX device capabilities and re-start the subsystem.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the interrupt example was unsuccessful.

simplesect.para: Unless setup failed, main will never return since DpTxSs_IntrExample is blocking (it is waiting on interrupts for Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) events.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPTX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the power state interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a no video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a vertical blank interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a training lost interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a valid video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the training done interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the unplug event occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the link bandwidth change occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for PLL reset request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for PLL reset request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access lane set request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Test CRC Event request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access link qual request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access prbs error count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Video Phy.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Video Phy configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sets proper ref clk frequency and line rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Video PHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets GT in 16-bits (2-Byte) or 32-bits (4-Byte) mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Video PHY instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets link line rate.

parameterdescription.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.

parameterdescription.para: to timer
to wait

briefdescription.para: This function takes care HPD event.
This function takes care HPD pulse interrupt.
This function is the main hpd pulse process.
This function sets up DPTxSubsystem.

parameterdescription.para: 1st block
2nd block

briefdescription.para: This function sets up PHY.

parameterdescription.para: to VideoPHY
Config table

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 line_rate, u8 lane_count, user_config_struct user_config, XDpTxSs_MainStreamAttributes Msa[4])
memberdef.name: start_tx

briefdescription.para: This function starts tx process.

parameterdescription.para: rate
counts
to resolution table
per components
pattern to output

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function to check MMCM lock status.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDpTxSs *InstancePtr, u8 Edid_org[128], u8 Edid1_org[128], u16 res_update)
memberdef.name: hpd_con

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD event.

briefdescription.para: This function to send Audio Information Frame.

detaileddescription.para:
XilAudioInfoFrame
None.
None. This function to calculate EDID checksum

parameterdescription.para: data
of the edid data

briefdescription.para: This function to find out preferred Video Mode ID.

parameterdescription.para: to edid data
capability of line speed
of lane

briefdescription.para: This function powers down sink.
This function powers down sink.
This function returns current line rate.
This function returns current lane counts.
This function sets VPHY based on the linerate.
This function power cycle the sink.
This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

detaileddescription.para: Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

briefdescription.para: This function scans VFMC- IIC.
This function reads DP141 VFMC- IIC.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: i2c_write_dp141

briefdescription.para: This function configures DisplayPort RX Subsystem.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if DP RX Subsystem configured successfully.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *InstancePtr, u16 offset, XDpTxSs_MainStreamAttributes Msa[4], u8 stream)
memberdef.name: Dppt_DetectResolution

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the stride.
This function configures Frame BufferWr for defined mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function configures Frame Buffer for defined mode The FrramBuffer is put in Autorestart mode for non-Adaptive Sync mode When Adaptive Sync mode is enabled the FrameBuffer is put in manual mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if init is OK else XST_FAILURE
